recent_excerpts: Threat actors are exploiting a critical flaw in the Marimo reactive Python notebook framework to deploy a new variant of the NKAbuse malware, using Hugging Face Spaces as a distribution point for the
A critical, unauthenticated remote code execution flaw in the Marimo notebook framework was weaponized by attackers within nine hours of its public disclosure, highlighting rapid exploit development.
